info.name: FounderLink API (Gateway)
info.description:
FounderLink API via API Gateway.

**Local setup:** Run Discovery, Config, Gateway, and services on **localhost**. Use Docker for infra: MySQL (3306), RabbitMQ, Zipkin. See `PORTS.md`.

**Order:** Discovery (8761) → Config (8888) → Gateway ({{gatewayUrl}}) → apps.

**Gateway routing:** `strip-path-prefix` maps `/api/<service>/...` to downstream services.

**Idempotency:** `POST` under `/api/**` requires header **Idempotency-Key** *except* **`/api/auth/**`** (register, login, refresh work without it). The collection pre-request script still sets `{{idempotencyKey}}` (GUID) for all requests; auth routes ignore it.

**Public (no JWT):** `GET /api/startups`, `GET /api/startups/**` (list, by id, by industry) — gateway allows anonymous GET for the startup catalog.

**Auth:** **Register** returns `message`, `userId`, `email` only (no JWT). **Login** returns `accessToken` and `refreshToken`.

**Startups:** `status` is `PENDING` | `APPROVED` | `REJECTED`. Public listing returns **APPROVED** only. ADMIN approves via `PUT` body `{"status":"APPROVED"}` or `{"status":"REJECTED"}`. Duplicate name per founder → **409** `Startup already exists for this founder`.

**Investments:** Requires **INVESTOR** (or ADMIN); startup must be **APPROVED**.

**Team:** **FOUNDER** `POST /api/teams/invite` body `startupId`, `invitedUserId`, `role` (e.g. COFOUNDER). Invitee `POST /api/teams/join` with `startupId`. `GET /api/teams/startup/{startupId}` lists members. Publishes **`team.invite.sent`** (notifications + analytics). Duplicate invite → **409**.

**Variables:** `{{gatewayUrl}}`; import `FounderLink.postman_environment.json`.

**Bootstrap:** Register roles → Login (Founder) → Create Startup → Login (Admin) → Approve Startup → Register (Cofounder) → Login (Cofounder) → Invite Team Member → Join Team → Login (Investor) → Create Investment.

exec: // Idempotency-Key: new GUID for POST /api/** (auth routes /api/auth/* exempt at gateway).

item.name: Update Founder Profile
item.description: PUT /users/founders/{id}. Use founder token and `founderAuthUserId` (from JWT after Register/Login Founder).

exec: if (!token || typeof token !== 'string' || token.split('.').length < 2) return null;

request.description: With **founder** JWT: view your startup in any `status`. For **public** access to an **APPROVED** listing, duplicate this request and set **Auth → No Auth** (gateway allows anonymous GET).
Public catalog: returns **APPROVED** startups only (non-ADMIN). No `Authorization` header required (collection default bearer is overridden).
Returns **APPROVED** startups filtered by `industry` (case-insensitive). Uses `{{startupIndustry}}` from environment.

ADMIN only. Send `{"status":"APPROVED"}` or `{"status":"REJECTED"}`. Do not send founder-style full update here — admin path requires `status`. Requires **Login (Admin)** and `startupId` from **Create Startup**.

item.name: Actuator — direct ports (no gateway)
item.description: Health checks on each service. Use when running apps on localhost with default ports from PORTS.md.

item.name: Messaging Service — Health (direct)

request.description:
This item uses a harmless GET on the gateway so Newman/CI can run the whole collection.

Messaging WebSocket is hosted directly on messaging-service (default :8085), not via gateway.

- SockJS endpoint: http://localhost:8085/ws-chat
- STOMP CONNECT headers:
  - Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>  (or native header 'token')
- Send destination: /app/chat.send
  Body must include senderId matching authenticated user
- Subscribe destination: /topic/conversations/{conversationId}

Use a STOMP client (Postman WebSocket, Hoppscotch, or a small JS client).

item.description:
Placeholder GET so Newman/CI can run the folder. WebSocket is not proxied by the gateway.

- SockJS: {{messagingServiceUrl}}/ws-chat
- STOMP send: /app/chat.send (JWT in CONNECT headers)
- Subscribe: /topic/conversations/{conversationId}
